summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Agenda module (6 sub-pages). Backend: 33/33 tests passed covering Events CRUD, Inscriptions, Avisos, Anotacoes, Notificacoes, Calendario aggregation, and Export. Frontend: All 6 pages load and function correctly. Fixed critical bug: SelectItem empty value error in EventosPage.jsx, CalendarioPage.jsx, and MuralAvisosPage.jsx causing dialogs to crash.
seed_data_creation: Test events, avisos, anotacoes, inscricoes created during backend tests - all cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agenda module fully tested. All 6 sub-pages working: Calendario (month/list views, type filters), Eventos (free/paid events, inscriptions management, financial integration), Mural de Avisos (announcements with priority and targeting), Minhas Anotacoes (personal notes with color picker), Central de Notificacoes (notifications with filters, mark read), Exportar (export events/inscriptions to CSV). Backend endpoints tested: /api/church/events (CRUD), /api/church/events/{id}/inscricoes (CRUD, payment confirmation), /api/church/avisos (CRUD), /api/church/anotacoes (CRUD), /api/church/notificacoes (list, count, mark read), /api/church/calendario (aggregation), /api/church/agenda/exportar/* (export). Sidebar navigation shows Agenda expandable menu with all 6 items.

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem empty string value causing runtime error 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value="" to value="_none_" for 'Nenhum' options in Department, Group, Responsavel, Conta Financeira, Categoria Financeira, Centro de Custo selects

bugs_fixed.issue: Same SelectItem empty string issue in department filter
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value="" to value="_all_" for department filter

bugs_fixed.issue: Same SelectItem empty string issue in Departamento Alvo and Grupo Alvo selects
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value="" to value="_all_" for 'Todos' options

calendario_page.details: Monthly grid view, list view toggle, type filters (Evento/Aviso/Aniversario/Financeiro/Ensino), month navigation, department filter

eventos_page.details: Create/edit/delete events (free and paid), event type toggle, financial fields for paid events, inscriptions management, status tabs

inscricoes_flow.details: Add member inscription, duplicate check (blocks duplicate), capacity limit check, payment confirmation, cancellation with refund

mural_avisos_page.details: Create/edit/delete avisos, priority levels, pin/unpin, department/group targeting, status filters

anotacoes_page.details: Create/edit/delete personal notes, color picker, reminder date/time

notificacoes_page.details: List notifications, filter by type/status, mark single read, mark all read, delete

exportar_page.details: Export events by date range, export inscriptions by event, CSV download

sidebar_navigation.details: Agenda menu expands to show 6 sub-items: Calendario, Eventos, Mural de Avisos, Minhas Anotacoes, Exportar, Central de Notificacoes

coverage: Events CRUD (create free/paid, list, get, update, filter by status)
Inscricoes (create, list, duplicate rejection, capacity check, payment confirmation, cancel with refund)
Avisos CRUD (create, list, filter by priority, update/pin)
Notificacoes (list, count unread, filter by type, mark all read)
Calendario aggregation (events, avisos, birthdays, financial, ensino)
Export (events by period, inscriptions by event)
